Notes: SMSU completes first weekend sweep since February 2008 and first home weekend
sweep since February 2006...Megan Stadler leads Mustangs with game-high 15
points...Tayor Luke scores team-high 14 points for U-Mary.
Game.Officials: Tom Knoblauch,  Dave Dennistoun,  Derek Wolden
